recent_calls.summary: The user, Xiuli Zhang, requested a regular service appointment for an air conditioning issue that was not cooling properly. The agent noted the preferred early morning time and confirmed no special instructions, promising that the team would contact her the next business day. The user also expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the AI assistant.

Melvin from American Home Shield called to report that a member's air conditioning is not cooling properly despite a technician's visit. The agent documented the issue, noted the dispatch number, and assured a follow-up appointment would be arranged as soon as possible. The user also agreed to receive information about home maintenance programs and provided positive feedback on the call experience.

Demarcus called to request a technician to address his air conditioning not blowing cool enough. The agent scheduled a regular service appointment for the next day and confirmed all details. Demarcus declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The agent greeted the user and attempted to assist with heating, cooling, or plumbing needs, but the user did not respond and ended the call shortly after.

Lisa called about an urgent issue with her air conditioning unit that is not cooling, which is affecting her elderly mother's health. The agent documented the issue as urgent and assured Lisa that the team will contact her on the next business day. The call ended with no further requests from Lisa.
The call was very brief and ended immediately after the agent introduced herself, with no further interaction from the user.

The user called after hours to inquire about their appointment and whether the appointment was still scheduled for that day. The agent explained that they could not access appointment details after hours but offered to take down the request for follow-up on the next business day. The call ended before the agent could complete taking the user's request.

The user called looking for Nicole, who had just called them. The agent explained that this was an after-hours line and offered to take a message for Nicole or assist with a service request. The user did not respond clearly, and the call ended without further interaction.

Gladys called to request urgent air conditioning repair due to extreme heat in her home and her health condition (leukemia) causing her to overheat and have skin issues. The agent documented her emergency and contact details but could not provide immediate service as it was after-hours, assuring her the team would call back the next business day. Gladys expressed frustration about previous missed callbacks and emphasized the need for a prompt response.

The user, Jana Gottlieb, called after hours to schedule a service check for her air conditioner with no emergency. The agent collected her contact details, service address, preferred appointment days, and email, and confirmed the information. Jana expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call experience.
The call was very brief and ended immediately after the agent introduced herself, with no further conversation.

The user called to inquire about a denied home warranty claim related to pet or pest damage at a property in Illinois. The agent collected the user's contact information and service address for follow-up. The call ended after the user confirmed the service type as heating and cooling.

The user called to expedite an emergency air conditioning service request for June 12, 2026, stating there was no active damage or gas leak but the unit was not cooling at all. The agent gathered details including the user's role as an American Home Shield agent and the dispatch number. The call ended after confirming these details without scheduling specifics or follow-up email.

The user called to request installation of vent holes on their bathroom vent fan to run the vent hose outside the house. The agent collected the user's details, confirmed the service type as ventilation ductwork, and successfully booked an appointment for June 22 at 8 AM. The call ended with the user being transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to confirm the timing of their AC service appointment scheduled for the next day. The agent confirmed the appointment details with the user, including the technician's name and the time window between 11 AM and 12 PM. The user had no updates or additional questions, and the call ended after confirming the appointment.

The user called to request emergency service for an outside condenser that wouldn't turn on at their address in Illinois. The agent collected the user's details, confirmed the emergency service request, and clarified that service is available to homeowners without a home warranty. The call ended with the user acknowledging the information and no further questions.

The user called to schedule a standard service request related to vents and mentioned having an approved budget. The agent attempted to gather more details but the user requested to speak with a service representative, leading to a call transfer.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user, Cassandra, returned a missed call and was greeted by the agent Sophie, who then transferred her to a live agent for further assistance. The call was successfully transferred shortly after the initial greeting.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to follow up on scheduling an air conditioning appointment after receiving a call from Nicole R. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent for further assistance and successfully transferred the call.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the call was promptly transferred to another agent for further assistance.
The user called to speak with a representative about their service. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Crystal from American Home Shield called to request service for a member, Angela Davis, whose air conditioner was never reconnected after a furnace installation. The agent confirmed the details and informed that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact Angela directly to schedule the service. Crystal provided positive feedback on the AI assistant's help.

The user, Raymond Sanchez, called to schedule an AC electric board replacement after a technician's visit. The agent collected all necessary details and confirmed the appointment request for the next day. The user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

Yolanda called to schedule a service appointment for her air conditioning unit, which is not cooling and leaking water, under her American Home Shield home warranty. The agent confirmed the details and informed her that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact her soon. Yolanda declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The user requested to speak with a live person, and the agent promptly initiated a transfer to a live agent. The call was successfully transferred without further conversation.

The user called to inquire about a delayed arrival time and was transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 18 seconds and ended with a successful transfer. No further conversation was recorded after the transfer.

The user called to request urgent service for a cooling system issue under their home warranty. The agent gathered necessary information and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The user expressed urgency and a desire to speak with a live person rather than an AI.

Denise McNeil called to inquire about the technician's arrival time. The agent confirmed her appointment with technician Amory scheduled between 12 and 1 PM and then transferred her to a live agent upon her request to speak with someone. The call was successfully transferred without issues.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent who could assist further.

The user called to follow up on a work order with Palm Shield and was transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent attempted to connect the user to the appropriate representative to handle the inquiry.
No conversation happened.
The user called Budget seeking a reliable option and expressed a desire for reliability. The agent attempted to gather more information, but the call ended shortly after without further details.
The user requested to speak with a human agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to a live agent successfully. The call lasted 13 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called to report an emergency situation involving a house fire and requested to speak with someone in the office. The agent advised the user to call 911 immediately and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.
The user called and requested to speak to the office. The agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent as requested.
The user called and requested to speak to CG. The agent attempted to connect the user to the requested contact and successfully transferred the call.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer successfully.

The user, Catherine Hamilton, called to inquire about the estimated time of arrival for a scheduled appointment with technician Devon. The agent confirmed the appointment details and informed the user that a more specific arrival time request would be passed on to the team for follow-up. The call ended with no further questions from the user.

The agent collected all necessary details and informed her that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact her shortly. Cassandra declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The user called and requested to speak with customer service representative Nicole. The agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent as requested.
The user requested to speak to customer service, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to cancel an air conditioner appointment scheduled at 6 Meramec Shores Court, O'Fallon, Missouri. The agent confirmed the user's details and assured that the cancellation request would be passed to the team for follow-up confirmation. The call ended after the user confirmed the cancellation details.

James called to inquire about the estimated arrival time for his AC service scheduled for the next day. The agent could not find the appointment in the system and offered to transfer James to a live representative, which he accepted. The call was successfully transferred to another agent for further assistance.
The user called customer service and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 16 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.

The user called to cancel an appointment scheduled for June 23rd for all times. The agent confirmed the cancellation details and informed the user that a human agent would follow up to confirm the cancellation. The call ended after the user confirmed the information and expressed thanks.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
